subcodes.first_line: In the night seasons, call thou the people unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and in the daytime do We cast upon them the verses of God, the Lord of all that hath been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی اللیالی ادع الناس الی الله المهیمن القیوم و فی الایام نلقی علیهم آیات الله رب ما کان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
